text:
DOA is the 8th track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack, written by mpi and sung by Aimee Blackschleger. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Title

DOA stands for "Dead on Arrival."

Musical motifs

This track has 1 remix: A1Gう.

The guitar riff is prominently used in the character image song for Jean Kirschtein "Rusty Honesty".

The part at 1:23-2:11 is a motif that appears in the track 進撃st-hrn-gt20130629巨人 (3:02-3:38)

All occurrences

 
|-|TV Anime=
|-|OVAs=
 

Lyrics

 
 
English= 
Can't you see over there?
Such a horrible sight
They're devouring all like you
Here come the giant hands
Breaking through the Wall
As dawn arrives
We still survive
Nobody knows what's going on
Tearing my town, limb by limb
Where are your mom and dad?

Was it shocking for you?
Something is scaring you
Enemies will hunt you
No matter what you do
But we'll fight for you
Til we defeat them all
If not...there's no way out

Keep your weapons aimed
Here come the chilling face
Pushing down your fear
Jump on the necks of the monsters
You can't hide yourself
You can't run
We're fighting for our lives
And we just can't lose again
There's not much time
Be ready to fight
Do it

I know how you feel
But we know what we must do

I know how you feel
But we know what we must do
